entity: Wilt Chamberlain 100 PTS vs New York Knicks on 1962-03-02 (PHW 169-147, all-time NBA single-game record, in Hershey PA)

query_target.sql: SELECT player_id, player_name, team_abbreviation, game_id, game_date, season_year, pts, reb, ast, fgm, fga, ftm, fta FROM analytics_player_game_complete WHERE game_date = '1962-03-02' AND player_name = 'Wilt Chamberlain' AND pts = 100 LIMIT 1

notes: The 100-point game is pre-1996-97, so fact_player_game_log (which starts 1996-11-01) doesn't have it. analytics_player_game_complete covers the full historical back to 1946 and has the row. The franchise had three era-matching abbreviations (PHI/SF/GSW) for that game_id; LIMIT 1 picks the canonical PHI row.
